step_1_capture_state.method: implement component per cycle-131 API design; migrate the most complex page (enterprise, 135 ln) as the parity proof before the simpler four; npm run build; inspect built HTML

pre_change_inventory.enterprise_duplication: imports DocumentationLayout + buildTechArticleJsonLD; local jsonLD const; <style> with .lede (shared, to remove) + .eval-table (single-use, to keep)

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 3-persona Q&A on the component + reference migration

q1_parity.question: Does the migrated enterprise page render identically — same sections, same lede, same SEO?
q1_parity.answer:
Yes — 6 H2 sections preserved, lede text + style preserved (.lede[data-astro-cid-h6dpntfm] inlined rule matches the

element), jsonLD description preserved byte-for-byte via jsonLDDescription override, eval-table kept local + still scoped.

q2_abstraction.question: Is the component thin enough to not constrain the most complex page?
q2_abstraction.answer: Yes — enterprise's numbered checklist + eval-table + 5 CardGrids all pass through the default slot untouched; the component only owns the lede + jsonLD.

q3_maintainability.question: Net lines removed on the hardest page?
q3_maintainability.answer: 135 -> 121 (-14) on enterprise alone, plus the jsonLD import/const and the 6-line .lede rule are gone; the +57-line component is amortized across all 5 pages.

step_3_decide.change_selected: Create PersonaPage.astro (thin wrapper over DocumentationLayout owning lede via named slot + jsonLD with overrides) and migrate enterprise onto it as the parity proof.
step_3_decide.ceiling_declared: structural DRY; enterprise -14 lines + duplication removed (within adopter-conversion expectations; page already lean post-D12)

step_4_implement.implementation_notes:
Component builds jsonLD internally from title/description with optional jsonLDTitle/jsonLDDescription overrides; renders

then default ; owns the .lede style. Enterprise: replaced DocumentationLayout+buildTechArticleJsonLD imports with PersonaPage; removed local jsonLD const; -> with jsonLDDescription override (its jsonLD description differs from the layout description); lede markup moved into ; removed the .lede rule from the local

post_change_inventory.lede_style_delivery: Astro inlined the component's scoped style into the page <style> block (small-sheet default), not an external bundle — verified present with matching CID
post_change_inventory.jsonLD_description_byte_for_byte: compliance, session audit, federation, and integration surface with existing engineering practice (preserved via jsonLDDescription override)
post_change_inventory.eval_table_preserved: <table class="eval-table" data-astro-cid-dknlmymp> + inlined .eval-table[data-astro-cid-dknlmymp]{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;...} rule present (single-use style kept local + scoped)

step_6_validate.method: 5-lens continuous-discipline overlay (prose unchanged — markup-only migration; lens applies to component doc-comment + preserved lede prose)

five_lens.lens_1_word_count_outliers: n/a — no page prose edited (markup-only migration; lede text preserved verbatim)
five_lens.lens_4_clarity_checklist: pass — component doc-comment states purpose + the named-slot scoped-style constraint; one concept per prop

step_6_validate.build_clean: PASS — exit 0, 155 pages, no broken imports / collection-schema errors
step_6_validate.parity_verdict: PASS — section/IA/SEO/style parity confirmed in built HTML; Risk #7 (scoped-style + slot) cleared by inlined-rule CID match (.lede[data-astro-cid-h6dpntfm] <-> element h6dpntfm)

step_7_record.iii_result: Cycle 132 complete. <PersonaPage> LIVE (57 ln) and enterprise migrated as the parity proof (135 -> 121). Build clean (155 pages, 5.0s). Lede styled correctly via named slot (inlined scoped rule CID-matched); jsonLD SEO preserved byte-for-byte via override; eval-table kept local + scoped. Reference migration proves the mechanism for cycles 133-136.
step_7_record.self_reference_so8: PersonaPage is the vault composing a reusable primitive from five repeated pages — module->component DRY, the same composition discipline aDNA documents.
seeds: skill_thin_wrapper_component_extraction (2/3) — confirmed on the hardest page first
skill_astro_scoped_style_slot_constraint (2/3) — named-slot lede CID-matches the inlined scoped .lede rule in built output
skill_seo_parity_override_props (2/3) — jsonLDDescription override preserved enterprise SEO byte-for-byte
